runtime_value_to_operationalize: Write and review a bounded Forge follow-up through the standalone host without Mission Control.
reentry_preconditions: keep the standalone workflow bounded and reversible
do not treat the reference host as a Forge runtime replacement
required_proof: Forge follow-up artifact can be written locally
Forge overview can read the new artifact
risks: Example payload should be replaced with real source-specific details before any live work
rollback: Delete the generated follow-up artifact if the example is no longer needed.
no_op_path: Continue using the standalone host for Discovery-only local work.
review_cadence: review on the next standalone-host completeness pass
